eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Ouray, CO; at 2:55 PM on JUN 28, 2026 Effective until 8:55 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a public safety message from Ouray County Emergency Management. There is a PRE-EVACUATION notice for Pecks Trailer Park to Cedar Hill Cemetery due to a wildfire in the area. Collect important documents and medications and be ready to leave at a moments notice. This is a public safety message from Ouray County Emergency Management. This is a PRE-EVACUATION notice for areas north of Pecks Trailer Park to Cedar Hill Cemetery due to a wildfire in the area. Collect important documents and medications and be ready to leave at a moments notice.
